goal: exists(k0: A) { left_open_interval(a, b, k0) and f(k0) = y }

p.c: function[T0: LinearOrder, T1](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1) { exists(k0: T0) { left_open_interval[T0](x0, x1, k0) and x2(k0) = x3 } = left_open_interval_map_image[T0, T1](x2, x0, x1, x3) }[A, B](a, b, f, y)

is_strict_monotone[A, B](f)
